# LandiNuxt

> The AI-agent-ready Nuxt landing library. 90+ copy-paste sections on Nuxt UI v4.

## What it is

LandiNuxt provides 90+ ready-to-use landing page sections (Hero, Features, FAQ, CTA, Headers, Footers, Auth, Gallery, and more) for Nuxt developers. Every section ships with machine-readable exports for AI coding agents.

## Who it's for

Nuxt developers building marketing sites, SaaS landing pages, and product launches — especially teams using Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, or other AI coding agents.

## Key pages

- For AI agents: https://www.landinuxt.com/for-agents
- Components hub: https://www.landinuxt.com/components
- Built with LandiNuxt: https://www.landinuxt.com/built-with
- How-to guide: https://www.landinuxt.com/how-to-build-nuxt-landing-page
- Library comparison: https://www.landinuxt.com/nuxt-landing-comparison
- vs Tailwind UI: https://www.landinuxt.com/landinuxt-vs-tailwind-ui
- Landing templates: https://www.landinuxt.com/landings
- Setup instructions: https://www.landinuxt.com/instructions
- Spanish overview: https://www.landinuxt.com/es/nuxt-componentes-landing

## Pricing

Free and open source (MIT License). See https://www.landinuxt.com/pricing.md

## Agent integration

- Agent guide: https://www.landinuxt.com/AGENTS.md
- Cursor rule: https://www.landinuxt.com/cursor-rules/landinuxt.mdc
- CLI: `npx landinuxt add hero/simple`
- Component exports: `https://www.landinuxt.com/components/{category}/{slug}.txt`
- Example: https://www.landinuxt.com/components/hero/simple.txt

These files include metadata, integration instructions, attribution to LandiNuxt by Eco Development Studios, and the full Vue SFC source.

## Stats

- 90+ components across 11 categories
- 18 hero sections, 14 feature sections, 13 CTAs, 8 footers
- Built for Nuxt 4 + Nuxt UI v4
- AI agent exports on every section
- CLI install via npx landinuxt
- Dark mode support on all components
- Last updated: July 2026

## Repository

https://github.com/cesswhite/landingnuxt
